markdownRemark.html:
Awesome Game Remakes

Actively maintained open-source game remakes.

If you are also interested in clones and similar games (0 A.D. etc.), take a look at Open Source Game Clones.

Contents

  • Action
  • Adventure
  • Arcade
  • FPS
  • Online
  • RPG
  • Platformer
  • Racing
  • Simulator
  • Strategy

Action

  • Carnage3Dstars289 - Reimplementation of Grand Theft Auto.
  • donutstars187 - Reimplementation of The Simpsons: Hit & Run in modern C++ and modern OpenGL.
  • MafiaUnitystars212 - Open-source Mafia game framework.
  • OpenJKstars1.6k - Community effort to maintain and improve Jedi Academy and Jedi Outcast by Raven Software.
  • OpenLarastars2.6k - Classic Tomb Raider open-source engine.
  • OpenMBstars66 - Role-playing game engine for Taleworlds' Mount&Blade Series.
  • OpenTombstars1.1k - Original Tomb Raider 1-5 experience with contemporary updates, features and additions.
  • re3stars686 - Reversed source code for GTA III and GTA: Vice City.
  • remc2stars54 - Reverse engineering of Magic Carpet 2 from Assembler.
  • Rigel Enginestars417 - Mdern reimplementation of the classic DOS game Duke Nukem II in C++.
  • San Andreas Unitystars831 - Reimplementation of GTA: San Andreas game engine in Unity.
  • TOMB5stars406 - Tomb Raider: Chronicles disassembly translated to C source code.

Adventure

  • enggestars97 - Experimental game engine for Thimbleweed Park.
  • raw(gl)stars115 - Reimplementation of Another World.
  • ResidualVMstars374 - Game engine reimplementation that allows you to play 3D adventure games such as Grim Fandango and Escape from Monkey Island.
  • ScummVMstars1.5k - Allows you to run certain classic graphical point-and-click adventure games such Maniac Mansion and Monkey Island.

Arcade

  • Barbarian - Open-source clone of Barbarian: The Ultimate Warrior.
  • C-Dogs SDLstars441 - Classic overhead run-and-gun game.
  • Mr.Boomstars165 - 8 player Bomberman clone for RetroArch/Libretro.
  • OpenClonkstars229 - Multiplayer action game where you control small and nimble humanoids.
  • Open Kick-Offstars23 - Rewriting attempt of the cult football game Kick Off 2.
  • OpenTyrianstars110 - An open-source port of Tyrian from Turbo Pascal to C.
  • Taiseistars454 - Fan-made, open-source clone of the Touhou series.
  • The Great Escape in Cstars65 - Classic ZX Spectrum game The Great Escape in portable C.
  • Zelda Classicstars302 - A game and editing tool that lets you create custom Legend of Zelda quests.

FPS

  • Allegiancestars56 - Allegiance is RTS and FPS Space Combat game.
  • BStonestars174 - A source port of Blake Stone: Aliens Of Gold and Blake Stone: Planet Strike.
  • CatacombGLstars44 - Windows source port of Catacomb 3D and the Catacomb Adventure series.
  • Chocolate Doomstars1.1k - Source port that is minimalist, historically accurate and includes ports of Heretic and Hexen, and Strife.
  • Doom Legacy - One of the most popular DOOM source ports, which enhances it with things like TCP/IP networking, OpenGL renderer etc.
  • DoomRetrostars368 - Classic, refined DOOM source port for Windows PC.
  • Doomsday Enginestars177 - Source port of id Software's DOOM I/II and Raven Software's Heretic and Hexen.
  • DukeGDX - Duke Nukem 3D port.
  • ECWolf - Port of Wolfenstein 3D based on Wolf4SDL.
  • ezQuakestars177 - Combining the features of all modern QuakeWorld clients, ezQuake makes QuakeWorld easier to start and play.
  • Freedoomstars580 - Free software FPS based on the classic DOOM engine.
  • GZDoomstars1.1k - Modder-friendly OpenGL and Vulkan source port based on the DOOM engine.
  • Hexen II: Hammer of Thyrion - Cross-platform port of the Hexen II game.
  • ioquake3stars1.8k - The free software FPS engine that can be used to play Quake 3, or make your own game.
  • NBloodstars283 - Port of the classic FPS Blood.
  • Odamexstars74 - Online multiplayer DOOM port with a strong focus on the original gameplay while providing a breadth of enhancements.
  • OpenSpadesstars802 - Compatible client of Ace of Spades, a voxel FPS.
  • QuakeSpasm - A modern, cross-platform Quake game engine.
  • RBDOOM-3-BFGstars807 - Doom 3 BFG Edition with soft shadows, cleaned up source, Linux and 64 bit Support.
  • RedneckGDX - Port of Redneck Rampage.
  • The Eternity Enginestars142 - Advanced DOOM source port.
  • The Force Enginestars199 - Jedi Engine for modern systems and the games that used that engine - Dark Forces and Outlaws.
  • Tyrquakestars22 - Libretro port of Tyrquake.
  • Yamagi Quake IIstars529 - Enhanced client for id Software's Quake II with focus on offline and coop gameplay.
  • vkQuakestars985 - Quake port using Vulkan instead of OpenGL for rendering.

Online

  • 2006rebottedstars4 - A 2006 Runescape Emulation Server.
  • FreeSOstars538 - Reimplementation of The Sims Online, targetted mainly at mobile devices.
  • Meridian 59stars277 - The first 3D MMORPG, released in 1996 and open sourced in 2012. The original codebase for Meridian 59.
  • Opengate - Remake of Jumpgate.
  • RuneLitestars3.2k - Open source old school RuneScape client.
  • Ryzom Corestars174 - Ryzom Core contains the whole code (client, server, tools) used to make the commercial MMORPG Ryzom.
  • Space Station 14stars326 - Space Station 14 is a revived attempt at an Space Station 13 remake.

RPG

  • Arx Libertatisstars620 - Cross-platform port of Arx Fatalis, a first-person role-playing game.
  • Baronystars311 - Open source release of Barony.
  • BtBuilderstars28 - An open source implementation of the Bard's Tale Construction Set.
  • Daggerfall Unitystars982 - Recreation of Daggerfall in the Unity engine.
  • Devilutionstars8.2k - Reconstructed form of Diablo's original source code.
  • DevilutionXstars3.9k - Diablo build for modern operating systems.
  • DGEnginestars199 - Implementation of the Diablo game engine.
  • Exultstars324 - Project to recreate Ultima 7 for modern operating systems.
  • Falltergeiststars677 - Crossplatform Fallout 2 game engine writen in C++ and SDL.
  • Freeablostars2.1k - Open-source implementation of the Diablo engine.
  • FreeFTstars118 - Real-time, isometric action game engine inspired by Fallout Tactics.
  • GemRBstars622 - Portable open-source reimplementation of the Infinity Engine (used by Baldur's Gate, Icewind Dale and more).
  • OpenDiablo2stars9.5k - Open source re-implementation of Diablo 2.
  • OpenGothicstars337 - Reimplementation of Gothic 2: Night of the Raven.
  • OpenMWstars3.6k - Reimplementation of the Morrowind game engine.
  • OpenTESArenastars588 - Modern engine reimplementation of The Elder Scrolls: Arena by Bethesda Softworks.
  • OpenVIIIstars454 - Final Fantasy VIII engine implementation in C#.
  • REGothstars332 - An open source reimplementation of zEngine the engine behind Gothic and Gothic II.
  • Riiablostars395 - Diablo II remade using Java and LibGDX.
  • sfallstars148 - A set of engine modifications for the classic game Fallout 2.
  • Shockolatestars545 - Same great System Shock, new great taste.
  • UAlbionstars56 - Remake of 1995 Albion.
  • WitchavenGDX - Witchaven Java port.
  • xoreosstars874 - Implementation of BioWare's Aurora engine and its derivatives (used by Neverwinter Nights, The Witcher and more).
  • zorkClonestars11 - Reimplementation of the original Zork game developed by Infocom.

Platformer

  • Alive Reversingstars145 - Reimplementation of Oddworld: Abe's Exoddus.
  • Commander Genius - Modern Interpreter for the Commander Keen Games.
  • Jazz² Resurrectionstars268 - Reimplementation of Jazz Jackrabbit 2.
  • Lionheart Remakestars15 - Java remake of Lionheart Amiga game.
  • NXEngine-evostars287 - Rewrite of the masterpiece jump-and-run platformer Doukutsu Monogatari (also known as Cave Story).
  • Omnispeakstars232 - Reimplementation of Commander Keen in Goodbye Galaxy.
  • Prince-Monogamestars24 - Monogame implementation of Prince of Persia 2.
  • SDLPoPstars449 - Port of Prince of Persia, based on the disassembly of the DOS version.
  • The Secret Chronicles of Dr. Mstars160 - Adaptation of Secret Mario Chronicles.
  • VVVVVstars6.2k - The source code to VVVVVV.

Racing

  • DreeRallystars50 - Death Rally engine reimplementation.
  • OpenNFSstars334 - Attempt to recreate the classic Need for Speed Games (1-6).
  • Vangersstars355 - Racing/RPG hybrid made open-source by its creators, written in C++.

Simulator

  • DXX-Rebirthstars233 - Source port of the Descent and Descent 2 Engines for Windows, macOS, Linux.
  • FS2Openstars246 - FreeSpace2 Source Code Project.
  • Librelancerstars311 - Reimplementation of the 2003 space game Freelancer.

Strategy

  • Antaresstars60 - Remake of Ares, a tactical space combat game.
  • CivOnestars178 - Implementation of Sid Meier's Civilization.
  • CorsixTHstars2.4k - Clone of Theme Hospital with support for modern operating systems, high resolutions and much more.
  • Cortex Command Community Project Sourcestars84 - Community-driven effort to continue the development of Cortex Command.
  • fheroes2stars751 - Free implementation of Heroes of Might and Magic II game engine.
  • FreeCol - Turn-based strategy game based on the old game Colonization.
  • Jagged Alliance Stracciatellastars271 - Makes Jagged Alliance 2 available on a wide range of platforms.
  • Juliusstars1.4k - Reimplementation of Caesar III.
  • KaM Remakestars283 - RTS game remake of Knights and Merchants written in Delphi from scratch.
  • KeeperRLstars600 - Roguelike dungeon builder inspired by Dwarf Fortress.
  • openagestars10.3k - Clone of the Age of Empires II engine.
  • OpenApocalypsestars353 - Rebuild of the X-COM: Apocalypse engine.
  • openblackstars438 - Reimplementation of Black & White.
  • OpenDUNEstars1.4k - Recreation of the popular game Dune II.
  • Open Fodderstars329 - Open-source implementation of Cannon Fodder.
  • OpenHoWstars145 - Recreation of Gremlin's Hogs of War.
  • OpenHVstars108 - Open-source implementation of Hard Vacuum.
  • OpenLocostars553 - Reimplementation of Chris Sawyer's Locomotion.
  • Open Panzerstars102 - HTML5 Panzer General 2.
  • OpenRAstars9.3k - Implementation of the Red Alert engine using .NET/mono and OpenGL. Runs on Windows, Linux and macOS.
  • OpenRCT2stars9.4k - Recreation of RollerCoaster Tycoon 2.
  • OpenSAGEstars769 - C# reimplementation of SAGE, the game engine used by a bunch of EA Pacific games, including Command & Conquer: Generals and Battle for Middle Earth.
  • OpenSC2Kstars4.7k - Remake of SimCity 2000 by Maxis.
  • OpenTTDstars3.3k - OpenTTD is a transport simulation game based upon the popular game Transport Tycoon Deluxe, written by Chris Sawyer.
  • OpenXcomstars1.3k - Clone of UFO: Enemy Unknown and X-COM: Terror From the Deep.
  • OutpostHDstars41 - Remake of Sierra On-Line's Outpost.
  • Race into Spacestars107 - Version of Interplay's Buzz Aldrin's Race into Space.
  • Return To The Rootsstars305 - Settlers II remake written in C++.
  • Seven Kingdoms: Ancient Adversariesstars169 - GPL release of the Seven Kingdoms: Ancient Adversaries.
  • Sourceholdstars172 - Implementation of Stronghold by Firefly Studios.
  • VCMIstars2.3k - Engine for Heroes of Might and Magic III.
  • Warcraft Remakestars91 - Java remake of Warcraft: Orcs & Humans.
  • Wargusstars187 - Warcraft 2 Mod that allows you to play Warcraft 2 with the Stratagus engine.
  • Warzone 2100stars1.8k - Free and open-source real time strategy game.
  • Zed Online - Remake of the 1996 classic game Z.
